description: Create a warranty tracking system that calculates expiration dates and days remaining. Include automated status logic and visual alerts for warranty expirations. Save the tracking system to /home/ga/Documents/warranty_tracker.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Create a warranty tracking system: calculate expiration dates by adding warranty months to purchase dates, determine days remaining until expiration, categorize status as Expired/Expiring Soon/Active, and apply color-coded conditional formatting.
